Books

12 January 2019

This article is a part of a category “books”.

The aim with this category is to publish posts about the books I’m reading. The posts will include main take-aways, favorite parts and probably a basic amateur review of the book.

The purpose is to aid my small mouse brain when trying to remember the key points of books I have read in the past.

But maybe others will find this helpful too.

tags: introduction
